channel.title: ZX Spectrum on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in ZX Spectrum on Tech Tracker

item.title: How to play ZX Spectrum games on Android using Speccy Emulator.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-G88Cz2ckL0s/YyzNsQQjm5I/AAAAAAAAOBk/Bv98R1ieizQ3QyMQE4n5JLeV4AOFEkbbwCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1663880621845179-0.png" alt=""> Now a days we are playing hd - high graphic video games but back in 1960s few decades back computers used to be big as car to run simple moving graphic game at first in year 1962 Steve Russell of MIT developed world’s first digital video game named Space War which is basically a software to run on computer. Fortunately, after SpaceWar in span of few years numerous developers created many more digital video games using various programming languages in that process we got better quality moving graphic video games but in order to install and run them you need computer which is expensive.
